title: Genetic basis of male sterility in pigeonpea
abstract: A new source of genetic male sterility - characterized by brown» arrow-shaped anthers was Identified at the University of Queensland. It was first identified in the line B15B which was derived as a selection from the cultivar Royes.   To obtain preliminary information on the genetic basis of this male-sterile character., fertile plants from B15B and F5 progenies of the cross (B15B x QPL-1) were grown..
